title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 78.590 - Meetings of the council — salary determined by city council
text:
78.590.  Meetings of the council — salary determined by city council. — Regular meetings of the council shall be held at least once every month and special meetings may be called by the mayor at the mayor's own instance or upon written application of two members of the council.  Each council member shall receive a salary as determined by ordinance of the council, payable quarterly.
(RSMo 1939 § 7086, A.L. 2004 H.B. 1047) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 6936
